title: Tempelhof Airport Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Tempelhof Airport Berlin is two visits in one:** the free open field and the airport building tours are separate experiences.
**Start with Tempelhofer Feld if it is your first visit.** The runway scale, open sky and former airport layout are the fastest way to understand the site.
**The field has seasonal opening hours.** June and July were listed as 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM when this guide was checked; winter closes much earlier.
**Use public transport, not a car.** S+U Tempelhof is easiest for the field; Platz der Luftbrücke is better for the building and Airlift Memorial.
**Book an official airport tour only if you want the interior story:** hangars, bunkers, roof views, architecture and Cold War layers.
**Bring water and respect field rules.** The middle has little shade, dogs need leashes outside designated areas, and barbecues are only for designated zones.
